items.deck: Former national security adviser John Bolton on Thursday criticized President Trump over his Iran war strategy, arguing the commander in chief does not know what his objective is or when the conflict will end.

items.title: IEA Chief Warns Gulf Flows May Take Six Months To Restore After Biggest-Ever Energy Shock
items.deck: IEA Chief Warns Gulf Flows May Take Six Months To Restore After Biggest-Ever Energy Shock The head of the International Energy Agency told the Financial Times on Friday that the world is severely underestimating the scale of the Gulf energy shock, and that it may take at least six months to restore disrupted oil and gas flows.

items.title: Trump calls NATO members ‘cowards’ over refusal to ‘help open’ Strait of Hormuz
items.deck: President Trump started his Friday with a broadside against NATO members who have declined to help make the Strait of Hormuz safe for shipping traffic.

items.title: Chuck Norris, action hero and star of 'Walker, Texas Ranger,' dies at 86
items.deck: Chuck Norris, the square-jawed martial artist and Hollywood action hero who became a symbol of rugged American masculinity as the star of the CBS series “Walker, Texas Ranger” and later as a popular internet meme, died Thursday, his family said

items.title: Chuck Norris dead at 86, family announces Friday
items.deck: Norris was hospitalized Thursday in Hawaii following a medical emergency.

items.title: Andrew Kent on the Alien Enemies Act
items.deck: His work further demonstrates that the AEA cannot be used in response to illegal migration or drug smuggling, but only when there is a military attack.

items.title: Bill Barr: Federal judges rely on this guide. It just took a sharp left turn.
items.deck: The judiciary needs unbiased scientific evidence, not climate advocacy.

items.title: Celebrate World Happiness Day With These Simple Hacks
items.deck: TODAY’s Ally Love celebrates World Happiness Day with simple hacks to brighten your mood, including sending loved ones happy messages and boosting dopamine with the three D’s: Dressing, Dining, and Décor!

items.title: British man accused of shooting partner in France
items.deck: George Goodayle allegedly killed his partner Jayne Nicholson at their home in southwest France.

items.title: Student Loan Office to Leave the Education Department
items.deck: The office will move to the Treasury Department as the Trump administration slowly dismantles the agency overseeing federal education policy.
